ideation: This sequence mimics peeling and eating a banana.  The animation starts with both arms at rest. Then, the right arm moves to hold the banana, followed by the left arm peeling the banana. Finally, both arms move to the mouth to eat the banana. The final frame shows the arms returning to a neutral resting position.  The sequence focuses on creating a natural, fluid motion, mirroring how a human would consume a banana.

frames.beat: right arm reaches out to grasp banana
left arm begins to peel the banana down
both arms bring banana to mouth to eat
arms return to relaxed resting position
